valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Tue 17 Feb 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Wed 18 Feb 2026
general_synopsis: Atlantic low moving rapidly east expected FitzRoy 995 by 0600 tomorrow. Low Fisher 995 losing its identity
